regional_cost_note: Window installers in Whangārei typically charge $650–$1,600 per aluminium double-glazed window installed, and $16,000–$48,000+ to re-window a full house. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. All windows must comply with NZ Building Code H1 energy efficiency requirements — confirm your installer uses compliant products.
